responses.question_text: What, if anything, would you most like to see improved in body wash or shower gel products?
responses.raw_answer: I would most like to see better fragrance options and improved cleansing power without harsh chemicals, all at an affordable price around ₹150-₹200.
responses.structured_answer: I would most like to see better fragrance options and improved cleansing power without harsh chemicals, all at an affordable price around ₹150-₹200.
responses.reasoning: Real interview data shows preference for cheapest products but dissatisfaction with lack of fragrance and desire for less chemicals and more cleansing.

responses.question_text: What, if anything, did you find most appealing about the Dove 60-Second Body Spray concept?
responses.raw_answer: The most appealing part is the promise of getting completely clean in just 60 seconds, which fits well for busy days when I have little time to shower.
responses.structured_answer: The most appealing part is the promise of getting completely clean in just 60 seconds, which fits well for busy days when I have little time to shower.
responses.reasoning: Survey responses indicate appreciation for the speed and cleansing benefit of the Dove 60-Second Body Spray concept.

responses.question_text: What, if anything, would you change or improve about the Dove 60-Second Body Spray concept?
responses.raw_answer: I would improve availability in common stores like D-Mart and local kiranas and reduce the price from Rs.399 for 200ml to something more affordable around Rs.250-300.
responses.structured_answer: I would improve availability in common stores like D-Mart and local kiranas and reduce the price from Rs.399 for 200ml to something more affordable around Rs.250-300.
responses.reasoning: Concerns about price being too high and availability issues were frequently noted in survey responses.

responses.structured_answer: The most appealing aspect is the 12-hour moisturization straight from the shower, which solves the hassle of applying lotion after every shower.
